sentences.arabic: سَمِعَ عَلِيٌّ الْمَثَلَ: «اتَّقِ شَرَّ مَنْ أَحْسَنْتَ إِلَيْهِ».
sentences.translation: Ali je čuo poslovicu: «Čuvaj se zla onoga kome si dobro učinio».
sentences.translationEn: Ali heard the proverb: «Beware the evil of one to whom you have done good».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ بَعْضَ النَّاسِ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ مَنْ أَحْسَنَ إِلَيْهِمْ.
sentences.translation: To znači da neki ljudi ne zahvaljuju onima koji su im dobro učinili.
sentences.translationEn: This means that some people do not thank those who have been good to them.

sentences.arabic: سَاعَدَ عَلِيٌّ زَمِيلَهُ فِي الدِّرَاسَةِ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Ali je mnogo pomagao svom kolegi u učenju.
sentences.translationEn: Ali helped his classmate with studying a lot.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَشْكُرْهُ الزَّمِيلُ فَحَزِنَ عَلِيٌّ قَلِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Kolega mu se nije zahvalio pa se Ali malo rastuži.
sentences.translationEn: The classmate did not thank him so Ali was a little sad.
